status.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN "content" ILIKE '% ' THEN 'trailing' WHEN "content" ILIKE ' %' THEN 'Space' ELSE 'Other' END AS "line_type", COUNT(*) AS "occurrences" FROM "db"."GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" GROUP BY "line_type";
solved_subquestions_list: Count the occurrences of each line type ('trailing', 'Space', 'Other') in the SAMPLE_CONTENTS table.
